exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: First RDL session — conservative start. Legs may carry fatigue from Tuesday floorball.

exercises.name: Pull-Up Parallel Close Grip
exercises.notes: BW. Stop each set at RPE 9 — do not go to failure. Establishes baseline.

exercises.name: Machine Seated Row
exercises.notes: Old school machine — max is 45 kg for 3 reps. Start at 30 kg, adjust up on set 2 if easy.
